assets.blenderNotes: No Blender work required unless the final mark becomes a 3D sign, pendant, badge, or emissive decal pack.
assets.unrealNotes: Use as SVG/vector source first, then derive decal, emissive sign, UI icon, pendant, clothing patch, billboard, and city signage materials.
assets.name: Official STATIC logo system
assets.replaces: Temporary SignalMark and AI-baked geometric concept emblems in generated art
requirements: Fully original owned mark with no Ready Player One/OASIS-style hex contract-symbol dependency
Primary wordmark, standalone mark, small favicon/app icon, city signage lockup, and monochrome versions
Derivative decal/badge rules for jackets, pendants, billboards, vehicles, venue signs, and UI
Vector source retained outside generated raster concept art
Trademark/legal review before treating it as final commercial identity

assets.blenderNotes: Open the existing GLB only for inspection, scale, texture check, and possible decimation; do not treat it as final MetaHuman-quality output.
assets.unrealNotes: Use as a temporary import test. Final Mr. Stone should move through the MetaHuman/humanoid rig pipeline before serious gameplay.
assets.name: Mr. Stone playable Entity rig
assets.replaces: Procedural Three.js Mr. Stone marker
requirements: GLB/glTF or VRM-compatible humanoid rig
Neutral idle, walk, car-entry, car-exit, sit, point, phone, drink, cigar, and VIP lounge animations
Wardrobe slots for jacket, pants, shoes, jewelry, watch, glasses, and status pass
See /assets/world/city/characters/mr-stone/README.md for the production rig spec
Mobile-safe LOD under 15 MB for first web prototype
